  • Method Details

    • show

      public void show(javafx.stage.Stage primaryStage, User currentUser) throws SQLException
      Displays the staff page
      Parameters:
      primaryStage - The primary stage where the scene will be displayed.
      currentUser - User currently using the system.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • showAlert

      private void showAlert(String title, String content, javafx.scene.control.Alert.AlertType type)
      Method to show an alert to the user.
      Parameters:
      title - Title of the alert.
      content - Content of the alert.
      type - AlertType

      Method to update the GUI for score calculations.

      Method to load and display reviewers.

      private void demoteReviewer(javafx.stage.Stage primaryStage, User currentUser, String reviewer)
      Method to demote a reviewer.
      Parameters:
      reviewer - Username of the reviewer to demote.
